# Hotline HQ

> Hotline HQ is an always-on voice hotline network that connects 500+ auto dismantler and salvage yards across 12 regional rooms in the United States. Members broadcast used auto part requests live and get answers from nearby yards in about 2 seconds.

## What It Is

Hotline HQ is a real-time voice network for the used auto parts industry. Member yards connect via desk phones or web clients that stay on 24/7. When a yard needs a part, they broadcast the request once — every yard in the regional room hears it live and the first yard with the part responds. Average response time is 2 seconds.

## Key Facts

- 500+ member salvage yards
- 12 regional rooms: California, Texas, Florida, Arizona, Ohio, New York, Georgia, Indiana, Michigan, Carolinas, New Jersey, San Diego, Iowa, Kentucky, plus Alberta, Canada, Mexico, Egypt, Spain, and Ghana
- 2-second average response time
- 24/7 always-on monitoring
- ~115 listeners per broadcast
- Flat monthly membership, no per-call charges
- Desk phone included with membership

## How It Works

1. A member yard needs a used auto part for a customer
2. They pick up their hotline phone and describe the part (year, make, model, part needed)
3. Every yard in the regional room hears the request live
4. Yards with the part respond immediately
5. Buyer and seller connect directly — no middleman, no commission

## Products & Services

- **Voice Hotline Network**: Always-on regional rooms connecting salvage yards
- **Parts Marketplace**: Online board of unanswered broadcast requests at https://hotlinehq.online/marketplace
- **Own a Hotline**: Platform for entrepreneurs to launch their own hotline network in any industry

## Company

- Built by Global Solutions Software (founded 2011)
- Headquarters: United States
- Contact: hotlinehq@redlineusedautoparts.com
- Website: https://hotlinehq.online
